---
title: false
pagetitle: "Teaching | Mesfin Genie"
page-layout: full
description: "Teaching and research supervision by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<main id="main-content">
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><h1>Teaching</h1><p>Health economics, behavioural economics and applied research supervision.</p></div></header>
<section class="prose">
<h2>Current courses</h2>
<div class="course-grid">
  <article class="course-card"><div class="course-code">ECON2112</div><h3>Health Economics and Finance</h3><p>Healthcare markets, insurance, provider behaviour, economic evaluation and health-policy design.</p></article>
  <article class="course-card"><div class="course-code">ECON3111</div><h3>Behavioural Economics</h3><p>Decision-making under risk and uncertainty, intertemporal choice, social preferences, experiments and behavioural public policy.</p></article>
</div>
<h2>Additional teaching</h2>
<p><strong>ECON3011 · Health Economics and Finance</strong><br>Course coordination and teaching in applied health economics, economic evaluation and health-system decision-making.</p>
<h2>Research supervision</h2>
<p>I supervise doctoral and master’s research in health economics, telehealth, discrete choice experiments, public-health policy, climate change and applied economic evaluation.</p>
<p>Prospective research students should send a CV, academic transcripts, a short research proposal and details of prior research experience to <a href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au</a>.</p>
</section>
</main>
```
